title: 10pcs Mouse Sander Pads Sanding Sheets 120 Grits 5 Holes Detail Sander Hook and Loop
features: Made from Aluminum Oxide, the sandpaper is durable and anti-static for different sanding and polishing.
Sanding triangles shaped, fits your mouse perfectly and doesn't clog up.
Pre-punched with 5 holes for uniform dust extraction,anti-static, provides a longer lasting grit.
Hook and loop backing for quick fitting.
Sander pads are suitable for many sanders which can be used for art and craft, wooden work, automotive, metal, plastic application for buffing and polishing.
description: Product Description 100% Brand New and High Quality sandpaper for sanding machines. Back with Velcro closure Designed for quick and easy change. Suitable for most mini sanding machines. The sander paper is suitable for grinding and polishing of metal, non-metal, wood, rubber, leather, plastic, stone,glass and other materials. Great value pack of palm sander sanding sheets.Fits most popular brands of mini palm sanders. Hook and Loop Design:The decker mouse sander pads come with durable hook and loop design, which is strong and have long lasting. Pre-punched with 5 holes for dust extraction, prevent obstructions. Hook and loop is easy and quick to stick, has strong adhesion, sturdy and practical. Easy to Use:These multi tool polishing sanding pads have excellent adhesion for easy and quick to install and remove. Each sanding sheet with 5 holes for dust extraction, ensures that the sanding discs is not easily crushed during the polishing process. Wide Application: Sander discs can be used on metal and non-metal, wood, rubber, leather, plastic, stone, glass, etc. Great for grinding, derusting and polishing effects, which is enough for your working needs. 5 Holes Sanding Sheets Assorted Back with Velcro closure Designed Hook and loop backed and easy to stick. Pads is for quick and easy changing. Ideal for polished metal, wood, jade and so on. Sandpaper Pads for Sanding, Polishing The sandpapers are made from aluminium oxide abrasive, which is durable, a good choice for sanding and polishing. The triangle sanding sheets sandpaper assortment from rough to fine to satisfy almost all your polishing requirements. Excellent Quality,High quality sandpaper for sanding machines. Our sanding discs hook and loop have fine abrasive, made of high strength viscous resin and alumina particles-durable Thickened hook and loop backing paper-sturdy and durable-good choice for sanding and polishing.
